stories.title: The Silent Patient1
stories.author: Alex Michaelides
stories.description: Alicia Berenson refuses to speak after shooting her husband. Theo Faber becomes obsessed with uncovering her motive.

stories.title: Dune1
stories.author: Frank Herbert
stories.description: Paul Atreides and his family are drawn into a deadly political struggle on the desert planet Arrakis.

stories.title: Project Hail Mary1
stories.author: Andy Weir
stories.description: Ryland Grace is the sole survivor on a desperate mission to save Earth from catastrophe.

stories.title: The Midnight Library1
stories.author: Matt Haig
stories.description: Between life and death there is a library, and within that library, the shelves go on forever.

stories.title: Atomic Habits1
stories.author: James Clear
stories.description: An easy & proven way to build good habits & break bad ones.
